standard curve preparation. The genomic DNA was

out in triplicates. All the standard curves used had a

Fluorescence in situ hybridization (FISH)
Approximately, 300 μl of freshly collected blood from
both set of samples was cultured in PB Max karyotyp-
ing medium (GIBCO) and chromosome preparation
was done using standard protocols [20]. A 3.4 Kb
clone of the DYZ1 was labeled with biotin-dUTP using sY 1125 + + + + + +
Nick Translation Kit from Vysis (IL, USA) and used
for FISH following standard protocols [20]. The images sY 1291 - - - - - +
were analyzed by Applied Imaging Systems Cytovision
software version 3.92.
Results
Overall STS analysis for recombination events and
chromosome intactness
Samples were checked for the presence of STSs
encompassing recombination events and intactness of
the azoospermia factor (AZF) regions.
AZFc region
chromosome
The AZFc region was analyzed for its intactness and
occurrence of different recombination events (P5-P1 sY 1161 - - + + - +
proximal; P5-P1 distal; gr/gr; b1/b3 and b2/b3) as per Y
the details given in table 1[21-30]. Besides, the TSPY- sY 1258 - - + + + +
TSPY recombination was also accounted for (sY1240, human
sY1250 positive and sY276, sY1238, sY637, sY1319 all
negative). None of the samples showed any of these of sY 627 - - + + + +
described recombination events. However, there were
region
